---
title: "Quiz 1 · the pipe and chaining syntax"
subtitle: "Friday, May 22, 2026"
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    embed-resources: true
    smaller: true
    output-file: "day5-quiz-pipe-slides.html"
  html:
    toc: true
    output-file: "day5-quiz-pipe-page.html"
  pdf: 
    output-file: "day5-quiz-pipe.pdf"
editor: source
---

::: {.callout-note style="font-size: 1.3em;"}
## [Today: Thursday May 21]{style="font-size: 1.3em;"}

**Before class**

- **Perusall Assignment**: *Data Computing* §3.6 ([Click here](https://psu.instructure.com/courses/2487468/assignments/18307712)).

**Plan for today**

- 

**Helpful links**

- [Syllabus](../../syllabus/syllabus.qmd) · [AI policy](../../syllabus/academic-integrity-and-ai-policy.qmd) · [Schedule](../../schedule.qmd) · [*Data Computing* §3](https://dtkaplan.github.io/DataComputingEbook/chap-basic-r-commands.html#chap:basic-r-commands)
:::

## Wrap-up & looking ahead

**NO CLASS MONDAY MAY 25 (MEMORIAL DAY)**

**Next week:** Data frames, intro to data graphics

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="55%"}
**Upcoming Deadlines**

- **Fri 5/22, 11:59 p.m.** — [HW 1: Basic R & Plots](https://psu.instructure.com/courses/2487468/assignments/18311694)
- **Tues 5/26, before class** — [DC §5.1–5.6]()
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}
**Reach out**

Stuck? Office hours, or email me ([cgc5478@psu.edu](mailto:cgc5478@psu.edu)) or Xinyue ([xpw5228@psu.edu](mailto:xpw5228@psu.edu)).

**Reference**

[Syllabus](../../syllabus/syllabus.qmd) · [AI policy](../../syllabus/academic-integrity-and-ai-policy.qmd) · [Schedule](../../schedule.qmd) · [*Data Computing*](https://dtkaplan.github.io/DataComputingEbook/)
:::
::::
